---
title: "New Jersey District Profiles"
subtitle: "A data profile for every school district in the state"
toc: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(dplyr); library(DT)
source("R/bundle.R")
dir_all <- readRDS("_bundles/_statewide/directory.rds")
dfg     <- readRDS("_bundles/_statewide/dfg.rds")
enr     <- readRDS("_bundles/_statewide/enrollment.rds")

latest_enr <- enr %>%
  filter(subgroup == "total_enrollment", grade_level == "TOTAL") %>%
  group_by(district_id) %>% slice_max(end_year, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) %>%
  ungroup() %>% select(district_id, enr_year = end_year, enrollment = n_students)

built <- sub("\\.rds$", "", list.files("_bundles", pattern = "\\.rds$"))

tbl <- dir_all %>%
  transmute(district_id, district_name, county = tools::toTitleCase(tolower(county_name)),
            type = ifelse(is_charter, "Charter", "Traditional")) %>%
  left_join(dfg %>% select(district_id, dfg), by = "district_id") %>%
  left_join(latest_enr, by = "district_id") %>%
  filter(!is.na(district_name)) %>%
  arrange(desc(enrollment))
```

Every number on these pages comes straight from the New Jersey Department of
Education, fetched with the open-source [`njschooldata`](https://github.com/almartin82/njschooldata)
engine. Pick a district to see its enrollment, demographics, spending, outcomes,
and school-climate data, with every metric benchmarked against its
[District Factor Group](about.qmd) peers. Nothing here is estimated or hand-entered.

```{r summary, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
n_d <- nrow(tbl); n_built <- sum(tbl$district_id %in% built)
tot <- sum(tbl$enrollment, na.rm = TRUE)
cat(sprintf("**%s districts** &nbsp;·&nbsp; **%s students** statewide &nbsp;·&nbsp; **%s** profiles published so far\n\n",
            format(n_d, big.mark=","), format(round(tot), big.mark=","), format(n_built, big.mark=",")))
```

```{r table, echo=FALSE}
disp <- tbl %>%
  mutate(District = ifelse(
    district_id %in% built,
    sprintf('<a href="%s.html">%s</a>', district_id, district_name),
    district_name)) %>%
  transmute(District, County = county, Type = type,
            DFG = ifelse(is.na(dfg), "—", dfg),
            Enrollment = enrollment)

datatable(disp, escape = FALSE, rownames = FALSE,
          options = list(pageLength = 25, order = list(list(4, "desc")),
                         language = list(search = "Filter districts:")),
          class = "stripe hover compact") |>
  formatCurrency("Enrollment", currency = "", digits = 0)
```
